text:
Fund: HDFC Mid Cap Fund Direct Growth | Category: Equity | Sub-Category: Mid Cap
Section: Fund Management

Fund Manager 1: Chirag Setalvad
  Managing Since: December 2012
  Education: Mr. Setalvad is a B. Sc and MBA from University of North Carolina.
  Experience: Prior to joining HDFC AMC he has worked with New Vernon Advisory Services Ltd., HDFC AMC and ING Barings N.V.

Fund Manager 2: Dhruv Muchhal
  Managing Since: June 2023
  Education: Mr. Dhruv has done B.Com, CA and CFA
  Experience: Prior to joining HDFC MF,he has worked with Motilal Oswal Financial Services Ltd., Goldman Sachs, CRISIL Global Research & Analytics and Deloitte Haskins & Sells
